history.content:
<thought>
The goal O is visible ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is safe, so I should move forward to continue approaching the goal while avoiding the lava cells nearby.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A célula imediatamente à frente está livre, então posso avançar com segurança. Isso me aproxima da área onde está o objetivo visível à direita.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly ahead of me, with one empty cell between us. Moving forward is safe and leads me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me, one cell ahead, and the path appears clear. I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly ahead of me, two cells forward in the current view? Actually, I am facing upward and the cell immediately in front is the '.' cell, with the goal O one more cell ahead. Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly one cell ahead and one cell to the right relative to my current position, and the cell in front of me is free. I should move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me, one cell ahead. The cell is safe, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly to my right, and the cell in front of me is a safe floor cell, but moving forward would not immediately reach the goal. Since I am facing upward, I need to rotate clockwise to face right and then move toward O.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal O one cell ahead and one cell to the right from my current position, but the cell directly in front of me is safe floor, not lava. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal and keeps me on a safe tile.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must not go forward. The goal is visible one cell ahead and one cell to the left relative to my current position, but that route is blocked by lava in front. I will turn counter-clockwise to face the open safe cell on my left.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me, and the cell ahead is free. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
O objetivo O está imediatamente à minha direita, e a célula à frente é livre. Porém, como o alvo já está ao lado, eu preciso primeiro me orientar para avançar até ele. Vou virar no sentido anti-horário para ficar voltado para o objetivo.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so I should not move forward. The left and right paths are blocked by walls in this local view, so the safest useful move is to turn to look for an open route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me, one cell ahead. That cell is safe, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly in front of me, one cell ahead. The path is clear, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
